text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature's mother is coming to visit in a few
days, so I make a suggestion after one of our
outings.
choice_data_list:
What do you think about entering the next
scrimmage?

What do you think about entering the next
scrimmage?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
The next one? The one Mayano said she's running
in?
choice_data_list: That's right. It's the day your mom is coming.
That's right. It's the day your mom is coming.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since she's coming all this way, we might as well
show her a race. Besides, with Nature's current
skills, she has what it takes to win.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh... And you won't accept no as an answer, I take it?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I guess I have no choice. I'll join. I don't know if I
can beat Mayano, though.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later. Right before the scrimmage...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
(Mom and Trainer are both here, waving at me
from the audience... It's just like elementary
school!)

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...I can't mess this up.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hehe! ♪ I'm going to win today's race too!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
(I knew Mayano would rush out from the
beginning. Just as expected, she's pace chasing.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we planned in the pre-race briefing, Nice
Nature is staying on Mayano Top Gun.
choice_data_list:
But... it seems like she's going faster than
usual...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: No way...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... All right, might as well get started. Time for takeoff!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
(No way, she's accelerating now?! So she wasn't
pace chasing, but front running?!)

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
(Darn it, the strategy is all off! If I let her keep
going... I'll lose!)

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Darn it aaaaall!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature dashes out of the group to follow
after Mayano Top Gun, but she loses her pace in
the process and ends up in third place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, Nice Nature's mother seems happy to see
how far her daughter has come.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: All the same...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's been a while since the scrimmage ended, but
Nature is nowhere to be seen.
choice_data_list: Her mom's waiting for us in the cafe, though...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't see her anywhere in the academy. Maybe
she went outside? According to her mother, she
would often go to the riverbank to sulk when she
felt sad.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer... Have you been looking for me?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for getting your hopes up for nothing! I'm
just the same old me, always third place! Hahaha!
choice_data_list: Yup, the same old Nature.
You don't have to force yourself to smile.
You don't have to force yourself to smile.

What's done is done! Let's do something to take
our minds off things!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for getting your hopes up for nothing! I'm
just the same old me, always third place! Hahaha!
choice_data_list: Yup, the same old Nature.
You don't have to force yourself to smile.
You don't have to force yourself to smile.

What's done is done! Let's do something to take
our minds off things!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
choice_data_list: You gave it your best, like you always do.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...So what?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You say I gave it my best, but my best is
worthless if I still lose!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I really wanted to win this race... I had to win this race!
choice_data_list: But your mother looked really happy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I tell her that her mother felt her determination.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But... still... It's really frustrating.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ugh, I cried way too much. Someone my age should not be crying like this.
choice_data_list: It's okay to let it out every once in a while.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Trust me, it's all out! Come on, let's go back to
my mom.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Nice Nature having regained her
composure, we go back to see her mother.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature acts embarrassed while they talk but
wears a happy smile on her face the whole time.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'm not forcing anyth—
choice_data_list: Well, I know I'm frustrated. I really wanted you to win.
Well, I know I'm frustrated. I really wanted you to win.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I think I got cocky after going step for step with
Mayano when we were partner running.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
And when she praised my speed, I didn't take into
account that she was also sizing me up...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Mayano really is on another level. She's a smart one...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But I bet she doesn't know what this feels like.
choice_data_list: Nature...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ah, don't get me wrong! I like Mayano, of course.
It's me that I don't like.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'm just narrow-minded, ignorant, and... plain.
choice_data_list: I think you're great just the way you are.
I think you're great just the way you are.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I reassure her that I'm here to help her get past
anything that's troubling her. We're a team, after
all.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: And what if that doesn't work?
choice_data_list: Then we can sulk here together.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Pfft. Hahaha! You're funny.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After taking a moment to compose herself, we
head back to her waiting mother.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature acts embarrassed while they talk but
wears a happy smile on her face the whole time.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, yeah? Like what?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I bring a befuddled Nice Nature to one of her
favorite spots—the shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Okay, now that you've brought me here, what are
we doing exactly?
choice_data_list:
The only thing you should do when your spirits
are down—get some food!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I go buy some taiyaki.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Taiyaki, huh?
choice_data_list: Oh, do you not like them?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I do. I was just remembering how my mom always
bought me one when I was feeling down.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Geez, both of you really know how to lay it on
thick.
choice_data_list: It just shows how worried we are about you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Worried, huh? I guess I worried Mom again back
there.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Maybe I should get her some taiyaki too, as an
apology gift.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We head back to her mother with a bag of taiyaki
in hand.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature acts embarrassed while they talk but
wears a happy smile on her face the whole time.
